arts.ttl: Thiago Motta's shame, fake accountability won't help Juventus through this slump
arts.sum: Taking responsibility for bad results is a good thing, but Juventus boss Thiago Motta took it entirely too far after his team was dumped from the Champions League and Coppa Italia in the same week. Serie A seems lost, too.
